ACTIONS.DeleteConfirm: Are you sure you wish to delete the {name} action from the {parent} {type}?

Cast.Description: Weave arcana to create a work of spellcraft.
Cast.Name: Cast Spell

Defend.Description: You concentrate effort on avoiding harm, heightening your physical defense. You gain the Guarded condition until the start of your next Turn.
Defend.Name: Defend

Delay.Description: You delay your action until a later point in the Combat round. Choose an Initiative between 1 and the Initiative value of the combatant after you. You will act at this new Initiative value. You may only delay your turn once per round.
Delay.Name: Delay

Move.Description: Move a distance by spending an amount of Action that depends on your Stride and which movement action is used.
Move.Name: Move

ReactiveStrike.Description: Perform a strike when an enemy leaves your engagement and you are not fully engaged.
ReactiveStrike.Name: Reactive Strike

Recover.Description: Spend 10 minutes outside of Combat recovering from exertion to fully restore Health, Morale, Action, and Focus.
Recover.Name: Recover

Reload.Description: Reload a ranged weapon which features a reloading time.
Reload.Name: Reload Weapon

Rest.Description: Spend ten hours to fully rest, including time to eat, sleep, tend to wounds, and recover resources.
Rest.Name: Rest

Strike.Description: Attack a single creature or object with one of your equipped weapon.
Strike.Name: Strike

ThrowWeapon.Description: Throw your equipped melee weapon to Strike at a nearby target. The attack suffers from +2 Banes and weapon becomes Dropped.
ThrowWeapon.Name: Throw Weapon

actionHooks.hint: BEWARE! Action hooks are an ADVANCED feature for automating action mechanics. Mis-configuring these hooks can have serious consequences. Do not attempt to make changes unless you are confident in your own knowledge.
actionHooks.label: Action Hooks

condition.hint: Additional reference text which clarifies the prerequisite triggering conditions under which an action may be used.
condition.label: Triggering Condition

action.hint: The base cost of this action in Action points.
action.label: Action

focus.hint: The base cost of this action in Focus points.
focus.label: Focus

hands.hint: The number of hands required to perform this action.
hands.label: Hands Required

heroism.hint: The base cost of this action in Heroism points.
heroism.label: Heroism

cost.hint: Configure the cost of using this action in Action Points, Focus Points, or Heroism.
cost.label: Action Cost

weapon.hint: Is the equipped weapon's Action Point cost added to the cost for this Action?
weapon.label: Add Weapon Cost

description.hint: A text description of how the action functions mechanically.
description.label: Action Description

id.hint: Provide a standardized camel-case alphanumeric identifier for this action. This identifier should be unique across all actions in the system.
id.label: Identifier

range.hint: Define a minimum or maximum range in feet at which this action may be performed.
range.label: Action Range

weapon.hint: The range of this action is defined by the effective range of the used weapon.
weapon.label: Use Weapon Range

actorUuid.hint: Which specific actor should be summoned by this action?
actorUuid.label: Summoned Actor

permanent.hint: Should this summon persist until killed?
permanent.label: Permanent

tags.hint: Add tags which define the requirements, behavior, and modifiers of this action. The order of tags matters as later tags will take priority over earlier ones if they modify the same properties of the action.
tags.label: Action Tags

limit.hint: Limit the effect of this action to a maximum number of individual target characters? By default, all targets will be affected.
limit.label: Maximum Targets

multiple.hint: Apply the effects of this action multiple times per target? By default, the action will apply once per target.
multiple.label: Multiple Applications

number.hint: How many of the selected target type are affected by this action?
number.label: Target Number

scope.hint: Which disposition of targets are affected by this action?
scope.label: Affected Scope

self.hint: Automatically target yourself if appropriate for the configured action target scope and type.
self.label: Target Self

size.hint: Certain target types are further modified by a size in feet.
size.label: Target Size

type.hint: Which type of target or area is affected by this action?
type.label: Target Type

TAG.AccurateTooltip: This action is particularly accurate. You gain 2 additional Boons when performing the action.
TAG.AfterStrikeTooltip: This action may only be performed immediately after a basic Strike attack which did not critically miss.
TAG.AuditoryTooltip: This action requires its targets to be able to hear to be affected.
TAG.BruteTooltip: This action involves the application of brute force and requires a weapon which scales using Strength.
TAG.ComposedTooltip: This action is a composed spell.
TAG.ConsumeTooltip: This action involves and requires consumption of a specific consumable item
TAG.CostTooltip: The Action Point or Focus Point cost of using this action.
TAG.DeadlyTooltip: This action has the potential to deal a tremendous amount of damage, increasing the damage multiplier for any damage dealt by x1.
TAG.DifficultTooltip: This action is complicated or challenging to perform. You incur 1 additional bane when attempting the action.
TAG.DisarmTooltip: This action, if successful, causes the target's weapon to be dropped.
TAG.DualWieldTooltip: This action requires wielding two separate weapons or being entirely unarmed to perform.
TAG.EmpoweredTooltip: This action is powerful and deals additional damage, gaining a +6 damage bonus if successful.
TAG.FinesseTooltip: This action requires a certain amount of finesse to perform. You must be wielding a weapon which scales using Dexterity.
TAG.FlankingTooltip: This action may only be performed against a flanked or unaware target.
TAG.GenericTooltip: Actions which perform a generic attack without using a specific spell or weapon.
TAG.HarmlessTooltip: This action does not impose a directly harmful effect, its damage multiplier is zero.
TAG.HealingTooltip: This action provides restoration by testing an ally's Wounds threshold.
TAG.IconicSpellTooltip: This action is an Iconic Spell learned through mastery of its components.
TAG.MainHandTooltip: This action utilizes your main-hand weapon to make an attack.
TAG.MaintainedTooltip: This action can be maintained, incurring its focus cost at the start of your turns.
TAG.MechanicalTooltip: This action requires use of a mechanical weapon.
TAG.MeleeTooltip: This action requires wielding a melee weapon or being unarmed to perform.
TAG.MovementBlinkTooltip: This action requires the actor to teleport as part of its movement.
TAG.MovementBurrowTooltip: This action requires the actor to burrow as part of its movement.
TAG.MovementClimbTooltip: This action requires the actor to climb as part of its movement.
TAG.MovementCrawlTooltip: This action requires the actor to crawl as part of its movement.
TAG.MovementFlyTooltip: This action requires the actor to fly as part of its movement.
TAG.MovementJumpTooltip: This action requires the actor to jump as part of its movement.
TAG.MovementStepTooltip: This action requires the actor to use a careful step as part of its movement.
TAG.MovementSwimTooltip: This action requires the actor to swim as part of its movement.
TAG.MovementTooltip: This action allows you to move as part of its activation, including a reduced action point cost for a free movement action per round.
TAG.MovementWalkTooltip: This action requires the actor to walk as part of its movement.
TAG.NaturalTooltip: This action involves performing a natural weapon attack.
TAG.NonCombatTooltip: Actions which can only be performed outside of a Combat encounter.
TAG.OffHandTooltip: This action utilizes your off-hand weapon to make an attack.
TAG.OneHandTooltip: This action requires wielding a one-handed weapon.
TAG.ProjectileTooltip: This action requires use of a projectile weapon.
TAG.RallyingTooltip: This action provides restoration by testing an ally's Madness threshold.
TAG.RangedTooltip: This action requires wielding a ranged weapon to perform.
TAG.ReactionTooltip: This action can only be performed during some other creature's turn when its activation condition is met.
TAG.ReloadTooltip: This action reloads a ranged weapon which requires reloading.
TAG.SevereTooltip: If the target of this action has Wounds and Madness resources, this action damages those resources directly regardless of their Health or Morale.
TAG.ShieldTooltip: This action requires wielding a shield to perform.
TAG.SkillTooltip: This action involves a targeted or opposed Skill check.
TAG.SummonTooltip: This action summons, calls, or otherwise creates a combatant which joins the encounter.
TAG.TargetTooltip: The target type, distance, and number which applies to this action.
TAG.TalismanTooltip: This action requires wielding a talisman weapon to perform.
TAG.ThrownTooltip: This action involves performing a thrown weapon attack.
TAG.TwoHandedTooltip: This action requires wielding a two-handed weapon to perform.
TAG.UnarmedTooltip: This action requires you to be fully unarmed in order to perform.
TAG.UnarmoredTooltip: This action requires you to be unarmored in order to perform.
TAG.VocalTooltip: This action requires its user to speak or otherwise vocalize sound.
TAG.WeakenedTooltip: This action is weaker than normal attacks and has a -6 damage bonus.

BODY_BLOCK.AlreadyConfirmed: The attack against you has already been confirmed and can no longer be blocked.
BODY_BLOCK.InvalidOutcome: You may only use Body Block after an attack against you is defended by Armor or a Glance.
BODY_BLOCK.MeleeOnly: You may only use Body Block against an incoming melee attack.

DELAY.AlreadyDelayed: You may not delay your turn again this combat round.
DELAY.WrongTurn: You may only use the Delay action on your own turn in combat.

INTERPOSE.AllyMustBeTarget: The selected ally must be the target of the most recent Strike.
INTERPOSE.AttackMissed: You may only Interpose against an attack that hit or glanced your ally.
INTERPOSE.RequiresStrike: Interpose requires the most recent action to be a weapon Strike.
INTERPOSE.SingleTarget: Interpose can only be used against a single-target Strike.

WARNINGS.AuraNoToken: You cannot use an Aura-target action without having a token on the scene!

CannotAffordHands.zero: {name} must have {hands} free hands to use {action}!
CannotAffordHands.one: {name} must have {hands} free hand to use {action}!
CannotAffordHands.two: {name} must have {hands} free hands to use {action}!
CannotAffordHands.few: {name} must have {hands} free hands to use {action}!
CannotAffordHands.many: {name} must have {hands} free hands to use {action}!
CannotAffordHands.other: {name} must have {hands} free hands to use {action}!

WARNINGS.CannotAffordMove: {name} has insufficient action to move this distance which requires {cost}A!
WARNINGS.CannotSpendAction: {name} cannot spend Action because they are Incapacitated!
WARNINGS.CannotSpendFocus: {name} cannot spend Focus because they are currently {status}!
WARNINGS.CannotTargetSelf: You cannot target yourself with this Action!
WARNINGS.CannotUse: {name} does not satisfy the prerequisites to use {action}: {reason}
WARNINGS.DirectMovementOnly: This action requires a direct movement path with no intermediate waypoints.
WARNINGS.IncorrectTargets: You may only designate up to {number} {type} targets for {action}!
WARNINGS.InvalidTarget: You must designate at least one {type} target for {action}!
WARNINGS.LastCriticallyMissed: You may only perform {action} after a basic Strike which did not critically miss.
WARNINGS.MaximumRange: A selected target is further than the maximum range of {max} feet.
WARNINGS.MinimumRange: A selected target is closer than the minimum range of {min} feet.
WARNINGS.MinimumSize: You must be at least size {size} to use {action}
WARNINGS.MisconfiguredSummon: The action {action} does not have a properly configured Summon target.
WARNINGS.MissingSummonEffect: ActiveEffect data must be defined to track the non-permanent summon created by the action "{action}"
WARNINGS.MovementTooFar: The planned movement path exceeds the maximum range allowed by this action.
WARNINGS.MovementTooShort: The planned movement path does not meet the minimum range required by this action.
WARNINGS.MustFollowStrike: You may only perform the {action} action after a basic Strike action
WARNINGS.MustReload: Your weapon requires reloading in order to use this action.
WARNINGS.MustScaleDex: Every weapon used in this action must scale using dexterity.
WARNINGS.MustScaleStrength: Every weapon used in this action must scale using strength.
WARNINGS.NoAbility: {actor} has no {ability} score, and therefore cannot use {action}.
WARNINGS.NoConsumable: No consumable Item identified for action "{action}"
WARNINGS.NoConsumableUses: Consumable item "{item}" has no uses remaining for Action "{action}"
WARNINGS.NonCombat: You may not use {action} during Combat.
WARNINGS.NoReloadRequired: Your weapons do not require reloading
WARNINGS.NotFlanked: {action} requires a flanked target. Target "{target}" is not flanked.
WARNINGS.NoViewedScene: A viewed Scene is required to acquire targets for this action.
WARNINGS.ReactionUnaware: You may not use a reaction while Unaware!
WARNINGS.RequiresMelee: You must have melee weapons equipped to use this action.
WARNINGS.RequiresNatural: This action requires use of a natural weapon.
WARNINGS.RequiresOffhand: This action requires an offhand weapon equipped.
WARNINGS.RequiresRanged: This action requires a ranged weapon equipped.
WARNINGS.RequiresSlashingMelee: {action} requires a melee weapon which deals slashing damage.
WARNINGS.RequiresTalisman: {action} requires use of a Talisman weapon.
WARNINGS.RequiresTwoHanded: This action requires a two-handed weapon equipped.
WARNINGS.RequireTemplate: You must place a Measured Template to indicate the area of effect of {action}.
WARNINGS.Restrained: You may not move while Restrained!
WARNINGS.Silenced: You cannot use this action while Silenced.
WARNINGS.UnimplementedTarget: Automation for target type {type} for action {name} is not yet supported, you must manually target affected tokens.
WARNINGS.WrongMovementToken: You must move the token performing this action.

ACTION.ChooseWeaponHint: You may choose which weapon to use for this Action.
ACTION.DelayHint: Choose an initiative value between 1 and {maximum} when you wish to act.
ACTION.RequestActorsHint: Drag individual Actors or groups here to request they participate in this roll.
ACTION.RequiresMovement: You must plan a movement path before this action can be used.
ACTION.RequiresRegion: You must place a Region before this action can be used.

STATUSES.FlankedDescription: You are flanked by multiple enemies who gain additional Boons to their attacks!

CREATION.AbandonContent: Discard creation progress and exit the creator?
CREATION.EquipmentHint: Browse items on the left and add them to your starting inventory.
CREATION.NameRequired: You must provide a character name to complete creation.
CREATION.RestartContent: Discard creation progress and restart from the beginning?
CREATION.SpendAbilities: Spend 9 points across 6 ability scores, allocating up to 3 points per ability.

currency.hint: The amount of currency possessed by this Actor.
currency.label: Currency Amount

appearance.hint: Descriptive information about the outward appearance of this actor which is visible to anyone with at least Limited permission.
appearance.label: Appearance

private.hint: Private information about this actor which is only visible to owners of the actor.
private.label: Private Biography

public.hint: Biographical information about this actor which is visible to anyone with at least limited permission.
public.label: Public Biography

engagement.label: Engagement
engagement.tooltip:
Number of Enemies Engaged
(Size - 2) + Engagement Bonus

engagementBonus.hint: An additive modifier to base engagement.
engagementBonus.label: Engagement Bonus

size.label: Size
size.tooltip: The number of grid spaces squared occupied by this creature.

sizeBonus.hint: An additive modifier to the base size of the creature defined by Ancestry or Taxonomy.
sizeBonus.label: Size Bonus

stride.label: Stride
stride.tooltip: Movement distance per spent Action Point.

strideBonus.hint: An additive modifier to Stride speed of the Actor defined by Ancestry or Taxonomy.
strideBonus.label: Stride Bonus

bonus.hint: An additive modifier to the base resistance of the creature defined by Ancestry or Taxonomy.
bonus.label: Resistance Bonus

immune.hint: Indicate whether this Actor is immune to this damage type.
immune.label: Immunity

milestones.hint: A record of milestones that have been earned by this group.
milestones.label: Milestones Earned

WARNINGS.NoAddSelf: You cannot add your own group!
WARNINGS.NotWorldActor: You can only add a World Actor

LABELS.BackgroundKnowledgeTooltip: This Knowledge Area is granted by your Background.
LABELS.BackgroundLanguageTooltip: This Language is granted by your Background.
LABELS.KnowledgeHint: Learn some Knowledge Areas from your Background or edit your Hero to gain some.
LABELS.LanguagesHint: Learn some Languages from your Background or edit your Hero to gain some.

ACCESSORY.empty: Equip up to {slots} accessories from your Backpack toggling the shield icon.

ARMOR.empty: Equip armor from your Backpack toggling the shield icon.

BACKPACK.empty: Add items by dropping them from the provided Crucible system compendium packs.

ICONIC.empty: Add iconic spells by browsing the provided Crucible system compendium pack.

TOOLBELT.empty: Equip up to {slots} tools or consumables from your Backpack toggling the shield icon.

WEAPON.empty: Equip weapons from your Backpack toggling the shield icon.

WARNINGS.MacroNoToken: You must have a Token controlled to use this Macro
WARNINGS.NoAction: Actor "{actor}" does not have the action "{action}"
WARNINGS.NoDragTalent: Talents can only be added to a Hero Actor via the Talent Tree.
WARNINGS.OverspentAbility: Too many Ability Points have been spent
WARNINGS.OverspentTalent: Too many Talents have been taken

adjective.label: Adjective
adjective.hint: An optional adjective used when composing an item name.

affixType.label: Affix Type
affixType.hint: Affixes must either be of the prefix or suffix type.

identifier.label: Identifier
identifier.hint: A unique string identifier for this affix (max 16 characters) used to declare hook functions and to determine affix IDs when applied to an item.

itemTypes.label: Item Types
itemTypes.hint: Which item types this affix can be applied to. If no specific types are checked, then all item types are allowed.

tier.label: Tier
tier.hint: The allowed range of power tiers for this affix. Each tier consumes one point of prefix or suffix capacity.

value.label: Affix Tier
value.hint: The tier of this affix applied to the item.

primary.hint: Select a primary ability score which begins at 3.
primary.label: Primary Ability

secondary.hint: Select a secondary ability score which begins at 2.
secondary.label: Secondary Ability

identifier.hint: A string identifier used to uniquely reference this Ancestry in tags, actions, or other UI elements. This identifier must be alphanumeric with no spaces or special characters.
identifier.label: Identifier

size.hint: The size of this ancestry in grid spaces.
size.label: Size

stride.hint: The starting movement speed of this Ancestry in grid spaces.
stride.label: Stride

resistances.hint: You must choose both a Resistance and a Vulnerability if you select either.
resistances.label: Damage Resistances

resistance.hint: A biological Resistance (+3) to a certain damage type.
resistance.label: Damage Resistance

vulnerability.hint: A biological Vulnerability (-3) to a certain damage type.
vulnerability.label: Damage Vulnerability

talents.hint: Configure one or more Talents that this Ancestry receives automatically.
talents.label: Talent Progression

color.hint: A representative color for this Ancestry used when referring to them in the user interface.
color.label: Ancestry Color

icon.hint: A small icon used to represent this Ancestry in the user interface.
icon.label: Ancestry Icon

WARNINGS.Abilities: The primary and secondary Abilities for an Ancestry may not be the same.
WARNINGS.ResistancesBoth: You must assign both Resistance and Vulnerability if defining either.
WARNINGS.ResistancesDifferent: The chosen Resistance and Vulnerability for an Ancestry may not be the same.

abilities.hint: Define how the ability scores for creatures of this Archetype scale as they advance in level. Allocate 12 points across all Ability scores. Each ability score must be between zero and 6. Adversaries will increase their abilities by 1 point each level. Scores with a higher value advance more frequently. Scores which are zero will not ever advance from their base value.
abilities.label: Ability Scaling

equipment.hint: Configure equipment which this Archetype receives automatically.
equipment.label: Granted Equipment

identifier.hint: A string identifier used to uniquely reference this Archetype in tags, actions, or other UI elements. This identifier must be alphanumeric with no spaces or special characters.
identifier.label: Identifier

skills.hint: Configure a selection of skills that will automatically progress their training rank for this Archetype.
skills.label: Favored Skills

spells.hint: Configure iconic spells which this Archetype receives automatically.
spells.label: Granted Spells

talents.hint: Configure one or more talents which this Archetype receives automatically.
talents.label: Granted Talents

SHEET.RequiredComponents: {spell} requires spell components not currently on this Archetype. Do you want to add them automatically?

WARNINGS.InvalidAbilities: The sum of ability scaling values must equal 12. Currently {sum}
WARNINGS.InvalidSpells: There must not be duplicate spells on an archetype.
WARNINGS.NotEquipment: The dropped document must be Equipment.
WARNINGS.NotSpell: The dropped document must be an Iconic Spell.

MILESTONE.GroupAward: Awarded {number} {label} to group {name} and the following members:
MILESTONE.GroupRevoke: Revoked {number} {label} from group {name} and the following members:
MILESTONE.IdentifierHint: A unique identifier for the milestone award, must be a slug (no spaces or special characters).
MILESTONE.RecipientsHint: Designate one or more heroes to receive the milestone.

WARNINGS.CannotAfford: The following actors cannot afford the cost of this enricher: {actors}
WARNINGS.CannotRevokeMilestone: There is no milestone award with identifier "{identifier}" on group "{group}"
WARNINGS.DuplicateMilestone: A milestone with identifier "{identifier}" has already been awarded to group "{group}"
WARNINGS.InvalidMilestoneNumber: The number of milestones awarded must be a positive integer
WARNINGS.InvalidMilestoneRecipient: Actor ID "{id}" cannot be awarded a milestone
WARNINGS.InvalidMilestoneRevokee: Actor ID "{id}" cannot have a milestone revoked
WARNINGS.InvalidTerms: Unable to parse {terms} as valid award terms.
WARNINGS.RequiresGM: You must be a Gamemaster to use Award enrichers.

ERRORS.Apply: You may only apply a background to a level 0 character with no spent skill points.
ERRORS.TalentTier: Backgrounds may only offer Tier 0 starting Talents.

identifier.hint: A string identifier used to uniquely reference this Background in tags, actions, or other UI elements. This identifier must be alphanumeric with no spaces or special characters.
identifier.label: Identifier

knowledge.hint: Configure knowledge areas that this Background provides automatically. Typically, a Background features two knowledge areas.
knowledge.label: Knowledge Areas

languages.hint: Configure languages that this Background provides automatically.
languages.label: Known Languages

skills.hint: Configure skills which this Background provides automatically with novice training. Typically, a Background has training in two skills.
skills.label: Granted Skills

talents.hint: Configure one or more talents which this Background receives automatically. Typically, a Background receives two granted talents.
talents.label: Acquired Talents

color.hint: A representative color for this Background used when referring to them in the user interface.
color.label: Background Color

icon.hint: A small icon used to represent this Background in the user interface.
icon.label: Background Icon

SHEET.TalentDrop: Add a talent to this Background by dragging and dropping from the Talents compendium pack.

amount.hint: The amount of damage (or restoration) which should be done each turn.
amount.label: Amount

resource.hint: The resource targeted by this damage/restoration
resource.label: Resource

regions.hint: The regions dependent on this effect.
regions.label: Regions

summons.hint: The summoned Tokens dependent on this effect.
summons.label: Summons

WARNINGS.CannotChangeRound: Only a Gamemaster user may change the Combat round.

scroll.gestures.label: Gestures
scroll.hint: Configure the spellcraft components that this spell scroll provides temporary knowledge of.
scroll.inflections.label: Inflections
scroll.label: Spell Scroll
scroll.runes.label: Runes

uses.hint: Configure a limited number of uses of this consumable item before it becomes depleted.
uses.label: Uses
uses.max.label: Maximum
uses.value.label: Value

SCROLL.ComponentBudget: This scroll may provide up to {budget} spellcraft component(s). Select which components this scroll provides.
SCROLL.ComponentBudgetError: This scroll may only include {budget} spellcraft component(s) total, but {total} were provided.
SCROLL.NoComponents: This spell scroll is blank and cannot be read.

GROUP_CHECK.Title: Group Skill Check
GROUP_CHECK.RequiresGM: Only a Gamemaster can initiate group checks.

HOOKS.NoModuleHooks: No module hooks are registered for this identifier.

ACTIONS.RecoverAllContent: Pick up all of {actor}'s dropped items?

private.hint: A description of this item which is only visible to Gamemaster users.
private.label: Secret Description

public.hint: A description of this item which is visible to any user with at least OBSERVER permission.
public.label: Public Description

identifier.hint: A unique string identifier used to reference this Item. Multiple copies of this same item all share the same identifier.
identifier.label: Identifier

SHEET.NoAffixCapacity: This item's quality is too low to support affixes. Upgrade to Fine or better quality.
SHEET.NoAffixes: Drag an affix from the Affixes compendium to apply one.
SHEET.UniqueItemNoAffixes: This item is unique and cannot be enchanted with affixes. Its magical properties are defined by module hooks.
SHEET.EnchantmentDerivedHint: Enchantment tier is derived from the total tier of applied affixes.
SHEET.EquipmentDrop: Add starting equipment by dragging and dropping items into this area.
SHEET.SpellDrop: Add an iconic spell by dragging and dropping a Spell item into this area.
SHEET.TalentDrop: Add a talent by dragging and dropping a Talent item into this area.

WARNINGS.HookAlreadyExists: {item} already declares a function for the "{hook}" hook.
WARNINGS.InvalidIdentifier: Invalid Crucible identifier value "{id}" which must be alphanumeric without spaces or special characters
WARNINGS.NotTalent: The dropped document must be a Talent.
WARNINGS.QualityReductionBlocked: Cannot reduce quality of {name} because it has affixes that require the current capacity.
WARNINGS.UniqueWithAffixes: Cannot mark {name} as unique because it has affixes. Remove all affixes first.

RANDOMIZE.Title: Randomize Enchanted Item
RANDOMIZE.GMOnly: Only a Gamemaster may generate randomized items.

KEYBINDINGS.ConfirmActionHint: Confirm actions recorded within the last 60 seconds in the order in which they were taken.

RULER.CannotAffordMove: You cannot afford to move {distance} spaces which costs {action} Action points.

dc.hint: Assign the value which must be exceeded on a crafting skill check to succeed on crafting this schematic.
dc.label: Difficulty Challenge

hours.hint: The amount of time, in hours, that attempted crafting requires.
hours.label: Hours

currency.hint: Crafting this schematic may require some amount of currency used to represent required supplies or minor ingredients which are not explicitly modeled as items.
currency.label: Currency

consumed.hint: Are these ingredients consumed in the process of attempted crafting?
consumed.label: Consumed

quality.hint: A minimum quality of this ingredient that is required.
quality.label: Required Quality

affix.hint: Which packs will be used as sources of item affixes for enchantment.
affix.label: Affix Sources

ancestry.hint: Which packs will be used as sources of ancestries during character creation.
ancestry.label: Ancestry Sources

background.hint: Which packs will be used as sources of backgrounds during character creation.
background.label: Background Sources

equipment.hint: Which packs will be used as sources of starting equipment during character creation.
equipment.label: Equipment Sources

COMPENDIUM_SOURCES.hint: Configure which compendium packs can be used as sources during character creation.
COMPENDIUM_SOURCES.label: Configure Compendium Sources
COMPENDIUM_SOURCES.name: Compendium Sources

spell.hint: Which packs will be used as sources of iconic spells.
spell.label: Spell Sources

talent.hint: Which packs will be used as sources of talents for the talent tree.
talent.label: Talent Sources

SETTINGS.AutoConfirmHint: Enable auto-confirmation of actions in combat which do not deal damage or cause active effects. This can speed things up but is not recommended during play-testing.
SETTINGS.CruciblePartyHint: Configure which which Group Actor is the primary group of protagonists.
SETTINGS.EnableVFXHint: Play visual effects animations on the canvas when actions are confirmed.

CRAFTING.hint: Artisanal skills reflecting your character's ability to create items or equipment.
CRAFTING.label: Tradecraft

EXPLORATION.hint: Exploration skills pertain to your ability to traverse the world and meet its challenges.
EXPLORATION.label: Exploration

KNOWLEDGE.hint: Knowledge skills pertain to your character's learning and understanding across a range of topics.
KNOWLEDGE.label: Knowledge

SOCIAL.hint: Social skills pertain to your character's ability to interact with other people or groups.
SOCIAL.label: Social

ADEPT.hint: You are a subject matter expert and fluent in all base competencies and applications of this skill.
ADEPT.label: Adept

APPRENTICE.hint: You have refined and honed the techniques of this skill to a strong functional competence.
APPRENTICE.label: Apprentice

MASTER.hint: You are peerless in your mastery of this skill and of your advanced specialization path.
MASTER.label: Master

NOVICE.hint: You have some formal training or practical experience in the fundamental applications of this skill.
NOVICE.label: Novice

SPECIALIST.hint: Your proficiency with this skill is heightened by expertise in an advanced specialization path.
SPECIALIST.label: Specialist

UNSPECIALIZED.hint: You have not yet attained a specialization path for this skill.
UNSPECIALIZED.label: Unspecialized

UNTRAINED.hint: You have no formal training in this area. Any success you have in applying this skill is due to common sense or luck.
UNTRAINED.label: Untrained

SKILL.CantAfford: You cannot afford to increase this skill. The next rank costs {cost} points and you have {points} skill points available.

WARNINGS.NoUser: No non-GM users present to handle Counterspelling for actor {actor}

WARNINGS.AlreadyOwned: You already own {name} and cannot add it a second time.
WARNINGS.Banned: You cannot purchase additional Signature talents at this node or tier.
WARNINGS.CannotAfford: You do not have sufficient Talent points to purchase {name} which costs {cost} points.
WARNINGS.Inaccessible: You are unable to acquire "{name}" because you have not unlocked this talent tree node.
WARNINGS.Locked: You do not satisfy the requirements to acquire "{name}" which requires {requires} {requirement}.
WARNINGS.RequiresRuneGesture: You must know a spellcraft Rune in order to utilize a Gesture.
WARNINGS.RequiresRuneInflection: You must know a spellcraft Rune in order to utilize an Inflection.

abilities.hint: Define the initial ability scores for creatures with this Taxonomy. Allocate 12 points across all Ability scores. Each ability score must be between zero and 6. Ability scores which are assigned zero cannot ever be non-zero for adversaries of this Taxonomy.
abilities.label: Base Abilities

category.hint: The category of creature that this Taxonomy belongs to.
category.label: Category

identifier.hint: A string identifier used to uniquely reference this Taxonomy in tags, actions, or other UI elements. This identifier must be alphanumeric with no spaces or special characters.
identifier.label: Identifier

size.hint: The size of this adversary in grid spaces.
size.label: Size

stride.label: Stride
stride.tooltip: Movement distance per spent Action Point.

resistances.hint: Define how the resistances and vulnerabilities for creatures of this Taxonomy scale as they advance in level. Assign values to each resistance between -3 (most vulnerable) and +3 (most resistant). Damage types set to zero are neither resistant nor vulnerable. Granting immunity to a damage type will is equivalent to a "+4" resistance. The total across all resistances & immunities must sum to zero.

immune.hint: Indicate whether a creature of this taxonomy is immune to this damage type.
immune.label: Damage Immunity

resistances.label: Resistance Scaling

value.hint: Numerical resistance to a this damage type, value between -3 (most vulnerable) and 3 (most resistant). Scales as a creature of this Taxonomy advances in level.
value.label: Resistance Scaling Value

WARNINGS.InvalidAbilities: The sum of initial ability values must equal 12. Currently {sum}
WARNINGS.InvalidResistances: The sum of resistance scaling values must equal zero. Currently {sum}

climb.description: Climb or descend a surface, a distance or elevation up to half your Stride attribute per Action. Creatures with an explicit Climb speed instead use this speed instead of half their Stride.
climb.label: Climb

crawl.description: Move while Prone a distance up to half your Stride attribute per Action.
crawl.label: Crawl

fly.description: Move through the air a distance up to your Fly attribute per Action. Only creatures with a Fly speed can use this movement mode.
fly.label: Fly

jump.description: Leap to traverse a distance up to half your Stride attribute per Action.
jump.label: Jump

step.description: Move cautiously a distance up to half your Stride attribute per Action. This movement does not provoke disengagement.
step.label: Step

swim.description: Move through water that is waist-deep or deeper a distance up to half your Stride attribute per Action. Creatures with an explicit Swim speed instead use this speed instead of half their Stride.
swim.label: Swim

walk.description: Move a distance up to your Stride attribute per Action.
walk.label: Walk

skills.hint: Identify skills or tradecraft which involves usage of this particular tool.
skills.label: Related Skills

WALKTHROUGH.AbilityPoints: Spend available Ability Points by increasing your Ability scores.
WALKTHROUGH.AddAncestry: Choose an Ancestry from the Compendium or Items sidebar and add it via drag-and-drop.
WALKTHROUGH.AddBackground: Choose a Background from the Compendium or Items sidebar and add it via drag-and-drop.
WALKTHROUGH.ConfigureArchetype: Configure an Archetype for this adversary.
WALKTHROUGH.ConfigureTaxonomy: Configure a Taxonomy for this adversary.
WALKTHROUGH.LevelOne: Set your character to Level 1 and begin your adventure!
WALKTHROUGH.LevelUp: You have made enough progress to advance to a new level. Increase your level by one when you are ready!
WALKTHROUGH.LevelZero: Complete all character creation steps before advancing your character to Level 1.
WALKTHROUGH.LevelZeroIncomplete: You may not advance to Level 1 until you have finished all character creation steps!
WALKTHROUGH.SkillPoints: Spend available Skill Points by increasing your Skill ranks.
WALKTHROUGH.TalentPoints: Spend available Talent Points by opening the Talent Tree.

WARNING.AbilityCannotDecrease: You cannot decrease this Ability further.
WARNING.AbilityCannotIncrease: You cannot increase this Ability further.
WARNING.AbilityRequireAncestry: You must assign an Ancestry before you can purchase Ability increases.
WARNING.CannotEquipActionCost: You cannot equip weaponry because you have no Action points available.
WARNING.CannotEquipInCombat: Actor {actor} cannot equip or un-equip {item} during a combat encounter.
WARNING.CannotEquipInvalidCategory: Actor {actor} cannot use {item} in the {type} equipment slot.
WARNING.CannotEquipSlotInUse: Actor {actor} cannot equip {item} because the {type} item slot is already in use.
WARNING.CannotEquipTaxonomy: Actor {actor} cannot equip {item} because the "{taxonomy}" taxonomy is incapable of using equipment.
WARNING.NoParty: You must have a primary party configured for this.
WARNING.SkillRequireAncestryBackground: You must assign both Ancestry and Background before you can purchase Skill ranks.

damageType.hint: Configure the type of damage dealt by this weapon.
damageType.label: Damage Type

dropped.hint: Has this weapon been thrown, disarmed, or otherwise dropped?
dropped.label: Dropped

loaded.hint: If this weapon requires loading, track whether it is currently loaded.
loaded.label: Loaded

slot.hint: Specify which equipment slot this weapon is equipped in.
slot.label: Equipped Slot

TAGS.AmbushTooltip: This weapon is well-suited to striking before your opponents get a chance to react. When attacking a target lower than you in the initiative order you gain +1 Boon.
TAGS.BlockingTooltip: This weapon provides a bonus to your Block defense.
TAGS.DamageTooltip: A shorthand representation of the offensive capabilities of this weapon, expressed as Attack Bonus / Damage Bonus / Damage Multiplier.
TAGS.EngagingTooltip: Weapons in this category allow you to better combat multiple foes, increasing your Engagement by +1.
TAGS.IntuitiveTooltip: This weapon is intuitive enough to be used untrained. The Skill penalty when using this weapon untrained is only -1 instead of -4.
TAGS.KeenTooltip: This weapon is particularly deadly when it achieves a critical hit. IMPORTANT NOTE - the keen property is not yet implemented in the playtest.
TAGS.NaturalTooltip: Natural weapons benefit from Natural Weapon Training rather than training from their actual category. Natural weapons cannot be dropped.
TAGS.OversizedTooltip: This item is over-sized or otherwise cumbersome to wield, preventing you from acting quickly. You have +2 banes to Initiative while this item is equipped.
TAGS.ParryingTooltip: This weapon provides a bonus to your Parry defense.
TAGS.ReachTooltip: This weapon provides a larger than normal effective range. You are able to perform basic Strike attacks at twice your normal range.
TAGS.ReliableTooltip: This weapon is trustworthy and almost never produces spectacularly bad outcomes. The critical failure threshold of the weapon is reduced by 2 making it less likely that unsuccessful Strikes yield a critical miss.
TAGS.ReloadTooltip: This weapon requires reloading in order to strike. When the weapon is not loaded, any actions which use the weapon cost +1 Action Points.
TAGS.ReturningTooltip: This weapon is magically or mechanically engineered to return to your hand after being thrown. Using the Throw Weapon action with this weapon does not result in it becoming Dropped.
TAGS.ThrownTooltip: This weapon is designed to be suitable for throwing and does not suffer the Banes penalty that is usually applied to the Throw Weapon action.
TAGS.VersatileTooltip: This weapon can be wielded with either one or two hands, and switched between these modes without any Action Point cost. While wielded in two hands, the weapon gains an additional +2 base damage but incurs 1 additional Action cost to Strike.
